content: adapter-mission-control package structure: types.ts (MC-only interfaces), mapper.ts (pure bidirectional status/object mapping), callbacks.ts (McCallbackHandler for SISU->MC PATCH), capabilities.ts (5 MC_CAPABILITIES as const array), handshake.ts (McAdapterHandshake with register+health+performHandshake), outbox.ts (OutboxProcessor with exponential backoff retry), index.ts barrel. Uses @sisu/protocol and @sisu/sdk only — no core imports.

name: mc-status-mapping
description: MC status mapping: open->queued, assigned->ready, working->in_progress, review->in_review, completed->done, archived->cancelled, failed->failed. Reverse: planning/in_progress->working, blocked->assigned. Implemented as const Record objects in mapper.ts.
